overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a rustic wooden settlement at night. The character moves from an open muddy yard between wooden shacks into a covered wooden walkway, with atmospheric lighting from lanterns and a cool, desaturated color palette typical of survival horror games.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy yard between rustic wooden shacks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the muddy yard between wooden buildings, approaching a lit porch

entered.detail: large rustic wooden building with a lit porch lamp and wooden steps
smaller wooden structure visible through the trees on the right
empty metal wheelbarrow sitting in the middle of the dirt path
stacked barrels with green tops and white bases near the fence line
metal wire fence running along the right side of the yard
vertical wooden post in the immediate foreground on the left

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open muddy yard between rustic wooden shacks at night. A wheelbarrow sits in the center of the path while green and white barrels line the right side near a chain-link fence. The area is dimly lit by a warm lantern on the main shack's porch.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden walkway attached to main shack

events.description: character steps from open muddy yard onto wooden planks under a covered roof structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered wooden walkway toward a closed door at the passage end

entered.detail: wooden plank roof structure providing cover over the walkway
elevated wooden boardwalk replacing the muddy ground
stacked wire mesh cages or crates under the covered roof on the right
closed wooden door with a small light above it at the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered wooden walkway attached to the main shack, leaving the open yard behind. The ground changes to wooden planks overhead shelter replaces open sky. Wire crates sit stacked on the right as the character approaches a wooden door at the passage end, illuminated by a warm overhead light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, muddy courtyard into the confined shelter of a rustic wooden walkway. It begins by tracking the character through a dim yard flanked by wooden shacks, passing a central wheelbarrow and a row of green and white barrels near a chain-link fence. As the character moves forward, the open night sky is replaced by an overhead shelter while the muddy ground shifts to weathered wooden planks. The scene then narrows into a covered passage lined with stacked wire crates, moving away from the porch lantern and toward a wooden door illuminated by a warm overhead light.
